items.title: Beyond Specification: Bunker Claims Insights, Early 2026
items.summary: Between January and May 2026, Gard handled over 70 bunker-related claims - a 50% increase on the same period last year. Almost all involved fuel quality, and the pattern has sharpened since the Middle East conflict escalated in late February.
items.summary_zh: 在2026年1月至5月期間，Gard處理了超過70宗與燃料相關的索賠，較去年同期增加了50%。幾乎所有索賠均涉及燃料質量，自2月底中東衝突升級以來，這一趨勢更加明顯。

items.title: Updated CINS guidelines: carriage of cocoa butter in containers
items.summary: The Cargo Incident Network System (CINS) has released updated guidance for the carriage of cocoa butter in freight containers, aimed at reducing the risk of heat damage, leakage and related operational incidents.
items.summary_zh: 貨物事件網絡系統（CINS）已發布有關可可脂在貨櫃中運輸的更新指導，旨在降低熱損害、洩漏及相關操作事件的風險。

items.title: World’s largest ECA adopted by the IMO
items.summary: A new emission control area (ECA) in the North-East Atlantic Ocean has been formally adopted by the IMO, tightening air emission requirements across a large part of European waters and linking existing ECAs in Europe to the Canadian Arctic ECA.
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織（IMO）正式採納了位於北東大西洋的新排放控制區（ECA），加強了歐洲水域大部分地區的空氣排放要求，並將歐洲現有的ECA與加拿大北極ECA連接起來。

items.title: MMG App updated with Hantavirus guidance
items.summary: The Mariners Medico Guide (MMG) has been updated with new clinical guidance for medical officers on hantavirus.
items.summary_zh: 海員醫療指南（MMG）已更新，提供有關漢坦病毒的新臨床指導給醫療官員。

items.title: Somali piracy warning
items.summary: While piracy incident levels in the Western Indian Ocean and Gulf of Aden today remain significantly lower than in the past, recent incidents underline that the threat persists. Vessels operating in these waters should maintain heightened vigilance and fully implement Best Management Practice guidan
items.summary_zh: 雖然西印度洋和亞丁灣的海盜事件水平顯著低於過去，但近期事件顯示威脅仍然存在。航行於這些水域的船隻應保持高度警覺，並全面執行最佳管理實踐指導。

items.title: Fuel shortages raise concerns over fuel tank levels on car carriers
items.summary: The conflict in the Middle East and resulting fuel shortages have led to questions within the shipping industry about whether vehicles transported on car carriers can be shipped with larger amounts of fuel in the tank to meet increasing demand in destination markets.
items.summary_zh: 中東衝突及燃料短缺引發了航運業的疑慮，關於汽車運輸船上運載的車輛是否可以在油箱中裝載更多燃料，以滿足目的地市場日益增長的需求。

items.title: New guidelines: shipping of lithium-ion cells and batteries
items.summary: The Cargo Incident Network System (CINS) has just released its “Guidelines for the Shipping of Lithium-ion Cells and Batteries”, addressing one of the key risks in global cargo transport.
items.summary_zh: 貨物事件網絡系統（CINS）剛剛發布了《鋰離子電池及電池運輸指南》，針對全球貨物運輸中的一項主要風險進行說明。

items.title: Power-operated watertight doors can be deadly
items.summary: Operating and passing through power-operated watertight doors remains one of the most underestimated – and potentially deadly – risks on board ships. A recent fatal accident highlights the need for continued vigilance and awareness.
items.summary_zh: 操作和通過電動水密門仍然是船上最被低估且潛在致命的風險之一。最近一起致命事故突顯了持續保持警覺和意識的必要性。

items.title: Scrubber risks: Lessons from six years of claims
items.summary: With nearly 7,000 vessels worldwide now equipped with scrubbers, adoption continues to rise. While the technology offers clear compliance and commercial advantages, six years of Gard’s claims data reveals specific patterns of corrosion, fire, and flooding.
items.summary_zh: 全球近7,000艘船舶已配備洗滌器，這項技術的採用持續上升。儘管該技術提供明顯的合規性和商業優勢，但六年的索賠數據顯示出腐蝕、火災和淹水的特定模式。

items.title: Enclosed spaces: When saving a life turns fatal
items.summary: Enclosed spaces on ships - such as cargo tanks, holds, and chain lockers - are among the most dangerous environments onboard. While much attention is paid to the initial victims of asphyxiation or toxic exposure, a significant and tragic share of fatalities are would-be rescuers: crew members who ru
items.summary_zh: 船上的密閉空間，如貨艙、貨物舱和鏈條儲存室，是最危險的環境之一。雖然初次窒息或接觸有毒物質的受害者受到重視，但許多悲劇性的死亡案例是試圖救援的船員。

items.title: FuelEU penalties: What charterers and owners need to know
items.summary: One year into FuelEU, the first penalties are being incurred, and the shipping industry is still figuring out who pays, how and when. From biofuel handling to reporting obligations, multipliers and credit pooling, shipowners and charterers face a complex web of requirements. This article breaks down
items.summary_zh: 燃料歐盟（FuelEU）計畫實施一年後，首批罰款已經開始出現，航運業仍在釐清誰負責支付、如何支付及何時支付。船東和租船人面臨著從生物燃料處理到報告義務、乘數和信用池等複雜的要求。

items.title: New biofouling regulations in Brazil
items.summary: Vessels above 24 meters in length that enter Brazilian waters are required to arrive with a ‘clean hull’ or perform in-water hull cleaning. Similar restrictions apply to vessels operating between domestic marine biogeographic regions. The enforcement date for the associated sanctions has been deferr
items.summary_zh: 在巴西，長度超過24米的船舶進入巴西水域時，必須以「乾淨的船體」抵達，或進行水中清洗。類似的限制也適用於在國內海洋生物地理區域內運行的船舶。相關制裁的執行日期已被延遲。

items.title: Fouling up Down Under: Biofouling non-compliance in New Zealand
items.summary: On 1 May 2025 submission of a Biosecurity Pre-Arrival Report (PAR) prior to arrival in New Zealand became mandatory. Certain vessels arriving in the country may also be required to go through a biofouling assessment, the failure of which can lead to disputes between owners and charterers.
items.summary_zh: 自2025年5月1日起，抵達紐西蘭前必須提交生物安全預抵報告（PAR）。某些抵達該國的船舶可能還需進行生物污損評估，未通過評估可能導致船東與租船人之間的爭議。

items.title: IMO updates fuel oil sampling guidelines
items.summary: The 'MARPOL delivered sample' size has increased from 400ml to 600ml and must now also be available for checking the flashpoint requirements under SOLAS Regulation II-2/4.2.1.
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織（IMO）更新了燃油取樣指導方針，將「MARPOL交付樣本」的容量從400毫升增加至600毫升。此外，樣本必須能夠檢查根據SOLAS第II-2/4.2.1條規定的閃點要求。

items.title: Regional sulphur emission limits at a glance
items.summary: Decarbonisation remains a key focus for the shipping sector, and the IMO continues to strengthen measures aimed at improving air quality in coastal areas, including the expansion of MARPOL designated sulphur emission control areas. In parallel, many regions, states, and individual ports enforce thei
items.summary_zh: 航運業的脫碳仍然是重點，國際海事組織（IMO）持續加強改善沿海地區空氣質量的措施，包括擴大MARPOL指定的硫排放控制區。同時，許多地區、州和個別港口也在執行各自的規範。

items.title: Hull biofouling – key recommendations
items.summary: The revised IMO Biofouling Guidelines came into force in 2023 and provide updated guidance on how to prevent the spread of marine invasive species. Here are the key recommendations.
items.summary_zh: 2023年修訂的國際海事組織（IMO）生物污損指導方針已生效，提供了防止海洋入侵物種擴散的最新指導。以下是主要建議。

items.title: EU ETS impact on EU MRV reporting
items.summary: Ships of 5,000 gross tonnage and above, carrying out voyages to and/or from ports in the European Economic Area, must submit a revised and verified monitoring plan for carbon dioxide (CO2), methane (CH4) and nitrous oxide (N2O) emissions to the administering authority by 1 April 2024.
items.summary_zh: 5,000總噸位以上的船舶，若執行往返歐洲經濟區港口的航行，必須在2024年4月1日前向主管機關提交修訂並經驗證的二氧化碳（CO2）、甲烷（CH4）和氧化亞氮（N2O）排放監測計劃。

items.title: EU ETS: important compliance clarifications
items.summary: As of 1 January 2024, vessels over 5,000 GT operating within EU waters are subject to the EU's Emission Trading System (ETS). A recent implementing regulation has clarified how a shipowner may transfer responsibility for compliance – but some important questions still remain.
items.summary_zh: 自2024年1月1日起，所有在歐盟水域內運行的5,000 GT以上船舶需遵守歐盟的排放交易系統（ETS）。最近的實施規定已澄清船東如何轉移合規責任，但仍有一些重要問題待解決。

items.title: The third pillar: a contractual architecture for maritime decarbonisation
items.summary: In the run up to the UN climate conference – “COP26” in Glasgow, we are pleased to share guest author - Haris Zografakis’ thoughts on the need for a new contractual structure in shipping to immediately reduce GHG emissions rather than simply waiting for regulation. Our guest author explains why clim

items.title: Boost for biofuels as IMO removes regulatory hurdle
items.summary: MARPOL Annex VI regulations were written for petroleum derived fuels but also apply to biofuels. It has been a challenge to meet the regulatory requirement to demonstrate that biofuels do not “cause an engine to exceed the applicable NOx emission limit”. Our guest author, Unni Einemo, explains the c
items.summary_zh: 國際海事組織（IMO）已移除對生物燃料的監管障礙，這將有助於生物燃料的發展。根據MARPOL附錄六的規定，生物燃料也必須符合不超過適用的氮氧化物（NOx）排放限值的要求。

items.title: Biofouling management: the benefits of a clean hull
items.summary:
**Updated 21 October 2022**

Australia has joined New Zealand and California and requires international vessels to provide information on how biofouling has been proactively managed prior to arriving in its territorial seas. While the aim of these national and sub-national biofouling regulations are
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亞已與紐西蘭和加州合作，要求國際船舶在進入其領海之前提供有關如何主動管理生物污損的信息。這些國家及次國家層級的生物污損法規旨在促進清潔的船體管理。

items.title: Entry into enclosed spaces - are you prepared?
items.summary: Recurring enclosed space incidents serve as a stark reminder that entry into such spaces without proper training or following procedures can result in seafarers being killed or seriously injured. Far too often, we also see that seafarers who die in enclosed spaces do so in the course of attempting t
items.summary_zh: 進入封閉空間的事件時常發生，提醒我們未經適當訓練或不遵循程序進入此類空間可能導致海員死亡或重傷。許多海員在封閉空間內遇難，往往是在嘗試救助他人時發生的。

items.title: Beware of binary thinking – a single alternative fuel may not be the panacea some seek
items.summary: In the critical quest for decarbonisation of shipping, our guest author, Martin Crawford-Brunt, advocates for broader thinking in how to reach the goal. He cautions – Don’t let the great get in the way of the good as we transition to a zero-carbon emission future.
items.summary_zh: 在航運去碳化的關鍵追求中，作者馬丁·克勞福德-布朗特提倡更廣泛的思考方式以達成目標。他警告不要讓完美阻礙良好的進展，應在過渡到零碳排放的未來時保持靈活。

items.title: Fitting of fuel oil sampling points becomes mandatory
items.summary: The retroactive MARPOL Annex VI requirement to fit or designate sampling points for taking representative samples of the fuel oil in use onboard ships entered into force on 1 April 2022, and the deadline for compliance depends on each ship’s schedule for renewing its APP certificate.
items.summary_zh: 根據MARPOL附錄VI的要求，自2022年4月1日起，船舶必須安裝或指定燃油取樣點，以便採集船上使用的燃油樣本。遵守的截止日期取決於每艘船更新其APP證書的時間表。

items.title: Decarbonization of shipping – emerging alternative fuels from a US perspective
items.summary: While the impact of COVID-19 on seafarers and port congestion have grabbed headlines over the past year, no single issue has dominated the maritime industry press more than decarbonization as climate change represents the greatest challenge of this century. According to the [U.S. Environmental Prote

items.title: After COP 26 – where are we with decarbonisation of shipping?
items.summary: International shipping emits 2-3 per cent of global GHG emissions whilst transporting close to 80 per cent of global trade by volume. The IMO target for reduction of GHG emissions from shipping is a 50 per cent reduction from a 2008 baseline by 2050.  Many in the industry see this as too little, too
items.summary_zh: 國際航運佔全球溫室氣體排放的2-3%，同時運輸近80%的全球貿易量。國際海事組織（IMO）設定的目標是到2050年將航運的溫室氣體排放量從2008年的基準減少50%。業界許多人認為這一目標過於保守。

items.title: Master’s checklists for loading and carriage of soya beans
items.summary: The checklists identify the type of evidence that should ideally be gathered to best demonstrate that there was no lack of cargo care on the part of the Master and crew.
items.summary_zh: 檢查清單確定應收集的證據類型，以最佳方式證明船長和船員在貨物護理方面沒有疏忽。

items.title: AMSA inspection campaign to focus on stowage and securing of containers
items.summary: In response to several incidents of containers being lost into the sea, the Australian Maritime Safety Authority (AMSA) has initiated a focused inspection campaign on container stowage and securing arrangements, both fixed and portable, that will run from 1 August 2020 to 31 October 2020.
items.summary_zh: 澳洲海事安全局（AMSA）針對多起集裝箱掉入海中的事件，啟動了一項專注於集裝箱堆放和固定安排的檢查活動。此檢查活動將於2020年8月1日至2020年10月31日進行。

items.title: Fixed gas detection systems – are you sure the correct gas concentration is displayed?
items.summary: During routine port state control inspections, the USCG found that fixed gas detection system sensors on a few LNG carriers were outside the tolerances established by the manufacturer and failed subsequent calibration checks.
items.summary_zh: 在例行的港口國家控制檢查中，美國海岸警衛隊發現幾艘液化天然氣運輸船的固定氣體檢測系統傳感器超出了製造商設定的容差範圍，並未通過隨後的校準檢查。

items.title: Tackling cargo misdeclaration – a first line of defence against container fires
items.summary: Container fires may now be occurring on a weekly basis and in Gard’s experience most are associated with cargo misdeclaration. However just as with tackling the fire itself, tackling misdeclaration is a significant industry challenge.
items.summary_zh: 集裝箱火災現在可能每週發生一次，根據Gard的經驗，大多數火災與貨物錯報有關。解決貨物錯報問題是業界面臨的一項重大挑戰。
